subject: Word cannot open attachment from Outlook
description: Double-click .docx from Outlook preview shows error or blank; save-as works sometimes.

ts_steps.title: Trust Center
ts_steps.action: Word → Options → Trust Center — Protected View — test uncheck 'Enable Protected View for Outlook attachments' (policy permitting).

ts_steps.title: Copy locally
ts_steps.action: Save attachment to Desktop, open from there; unblock file if marked blocked in Properties.

ts_steps.title: Repair Office
ts_steps.action: Online Repair; ensure Word and Outlook same channel build.

internal_information: Protected View, file block registry, or DLP agent locking temp. Security policy may forbid disabling Protected View.
